title: BREAK!! game system
description: This is a quick introduction to help you get started!

steps.title: BREAK!! welcome tour
steps.content:
This is a quick introduction to help you get started! Keep in mind this system does not include the game core rules, which can be found at breakrpg.com. It does, however, include the preview content you can download for free.

Currently, there is also a kickstarter going on for a new book! You can find more at START.

steps.title: Game settings
steps.content: First of all, you'll find some BREAK!! specific settings to set up before you play. These include info about sizes, armors, weapons and shields.

steps.title: Compendiums
steps.content: In your compendiums, you'll find an ailment compendium. You can add any active effect here and it'll be displayed in the token status effects. Besides this, you'll also find some game-ready free included preview content!

steps.title: Ready to go!
steps.content: We hope you enjoy your games! Remember to check out the BREAK!! blog for some extra content.
